description:
## Deep Component Audit — hx-slider

**Component directory:** `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-slider/`
**wc-mcp Health Score:** 90 (A)
**Known issues:** formAssociated, _internals, _hasLabelSlot, _hasMinLabelSlot, _hasMaxLabelSlot, _hasHelpSlot, _input, _sliderId, _labelId, _helpId — all missing descriptions.

### wc-mcp Tools — USE THESE
- `score_component`, `get_component`, `analyze_accessibility`, `validate_usage`, `list_css_parts`, `list_events`, `get_design_tokens`
- **Report wc-mcp bugs to `/Volumes/Development/booked/wc-tools` board.**

### Audit Scope
1. **Design Tokens** — `--hx-` tokens. Track, fill, thumb, labels. Dark mode.
2. **Accessibility** — WCAG 2.1 AA. slider role. aria-valuenow/min/max/valuetext. Keyboard (arrow keys). Label association.
3. **Functionality** — Min/max/step. Value. Labels (min/max/current). Form integration. Validation. Marks/ticks.
4. **TypeScript** — Strict. formAssociated. No `any`.
5. **CSS/Styling** — Shadow DOM. CSS Parts (track, fill, thumb). Cross-browser thumb styling.
6. **CEM Accuracy** — Fix all 10 missing descriptions.
7. **Tests** — 80%+ coverage. Value changes. Keyboard. Form. ARIA. Step.
8. **Storybook** — Basic. With labels. Step. Min/max. Disabled.
9. **Drupal Compatibility** — Range input. Twig-friendly.
10. **Portability** — CDN-ready. Form-associated.

### Deliverable
Detailed audit report. Fix CRITICAL+HIGH. Document rest.
title: Deep Audit v2: hx-slider
